name: FAA Helicopter Flying Handbook
source_context: FAA handbook source for retreating-blade-stall symptoms and high-speed/high-load contributors; qualitative anchor only.
note: Use this to validate that retreating-blade stall should be a high-forward-speed/high-load failure mode, not as a numeric multirotor threshold.

name: NASA CR-2008-215370 high advance ratio rotor review
source_context: NASA rotorcraft report reviewing performance data and theory at high advance ratio, including operation approaching mu=1.
note: Use as a rotorcraft high-mu range anchor; rotor scale and blade dynamics differ from FPV propellers.

name: UH-60A slowed rotor high-advance-ratio tests
source_context: NASA/Army high-advance-ratio slowed-rotor testing; useful for the mu range where reverse flow and stall become major rotor phenomena.
note: Use for high-mu/reverse-flow scale, not for direct small-prop CT calibration.

name: DLR ERF2023 dynamic-stall rotor-code validation
source_context: DLR paper uses model-rotor measurements at mu=0.4 to validate dynamic-stall computation.
note: Current Java retreating-blade-stall onset at mu=0.42 is in the same neighborhood as this published high-advance/dynamic-stall validation point.

name: DronePhysics blade dissymmetry thresholds
note: Mirrors calculateSteadyRotorBladeDissymmetryAerodynamics and nearby high-advance loss gates in DronePhysics.
